source: NAAIM Exposure Index (naaim.org) · CFTC COT TFF Leveraged Funds / Asset Managers (cftc.gov) · FRED: BAMLH0A0HYM2 (ICE BofA HY OAS), DRTSCILM (SLOOS), UMCSENT (UMich), MMMFFAQ027S (MMF assets)
note: Weekly NAAIM mean=% equity exposure (0–200). Weekly COT lev_net/am_net = contracts (long−short). HY spread in percentage points (OAS). SLOOS = net % banks tightening (positive=tightening). Consumer = UMich index (higher=more optimistic). MMF = Money Market Fund total assets in $B (high=cash-heavy=bearish).
